headline: Lennar (LEN) Gets A Lift From Housing Bill As Millrose Spin Off Nears
summary: Congress has passed a wide housing affordability bill that limits institutional bulk home purchases and promotes faster residential construction. Lennar (NYSE:LEN) is positioned as a large U.S. homebuilder that could see its core business supported by these policy changes. The company is also moving ahead with a Millrose Properties spin off, reflecting a shift toward a more land light operating model. Lennar enters this policy reset with its stock at $93.52 and mixed recent performance. The...
